task_completion.description: Open the target document in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: LibreOffice Writer (or a similar GUI word processor) is open, displaying the document 'origin_of_species_excerpt.docx'.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the four chapter titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chapter titles (e.g., 'CHAPTER I. VARIATION UNDER DOMESTICATION') are visibly formatted as large headings, or the style dropdown in the toolbar shows 'Heading 1' when a chapter title is selected.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 2' style to the eight section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The section headers (e.g., 'Causes of Variability') are visibly formatted as subheadings, or the style dropdown in the toolbar shows 'Heading 2' when a section header is selected.

task_completion.description: Insert a Table of Contents at the beginning of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block is visible at the top of the document, listing the chapters as top-level items and sections as indented sub-items, with corresponding page numbers.

task_completion.description: Save the document with the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks the 'Save' button (floppy disk icon), uses the File > Save menu, or the title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk or 'modified' status).

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI application like LibreOffice Writer, not terminal commands or Python scripts modifying the .docx file.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents was generated by the software, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents has a gray background (typical for generated fields in LibreOffice) or is seen being inserted via the 'Insert > Table of Contents and Index' menu.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document contains 4 chapters that must be Heading 1: 'CHAPTER I. VARIATION UNDER DOMESTICATION', 'CHAPTER II. VARIATION UNDER NATURE', 'CHAPTER III. STRUGGLE FOR EXISTENCE', 'CHAPTER IV. NATURAL SELECTION'. It contains 8 section headers that must be Heading 2: 'Causes of Variability', 'Effects of Habit and of the Use or Disuse of Parts', 'Individual Differences', 'Doubtful Species', 'The Term, Struggle for Existence', 'Geometrical Ratio of Increase', 'Sexual Selection', 'Illustrations of the Action of Natural Selection'. The Table of Contents must reflect these exact headings.
